Ohio Cricket

Welcome to MUSTANGZ

A competitive cricket team from the heart of Ohio — built on passion, powered by teamwork, and driven to dominate every pitch since 2012.

Our Story

More Than
A Team

The Mustangz were born in 2012 out of a shared love for cricket in the great state of Ohio. What started as a group of passionate players has grown into a competitive, close-knit team that competes across regional leagues and tournaments.

We represent Ohio cricket with pride — playing attacking, aggressive cricket while building friendships that last off the pitch too. Led by co-captains Balaji S and Senthil S, the Mustangz are here to make their mark.

Join the Team
🏏

Competitive

Regional leagues, tournaments, and fierce friendly fixtures.

🤝

Community

A welcoming team of cricket lovers from diverse backgrounds.

📍

Ohio-Based

Proudly representing Ohio on the regional cricket circuit.

🔥

Passionate

Every game played with energy, grit, and love for the sport.
